title: IoT Big Data Analytics Pipeline
description: A flowchart illustrating the flow of data from IoT devices through the various stages of big data processing and analytics tools to generate actionable insights.
elements: Data Ingestion Tools (e.g., Apache Kafka, Flume)
Data Storage & Management (e.g., Hadoop HDFS, NoSQL Databases)
Data Processing & Analysis Engines (e.g., Apache Spark, Flink)
Visualization & Action Tools (e.g., Dashboards, Alert Systems)
relationships: Raw sensor data is collected by ingestion tools
Ingested data is stored in distributed storage systems
Stored data is processed by analytics engines for batch/stream analysis
Analysis results are visualized for decision-making and trigger actions
